note: Pinned upstream versions the PrivateOffice editor image is built on. Translations are authored against this exact version. Re-pin deliberately on upgrade; never float to :latest. See the controlled-upgrade process in assisted_translate.md.

online_from_source.note: Collabora Online (coolwsd + browser bundle) is built from THIS source against the base image's engine (same version). The LO/Collabora Office core is NOT built from source. See editor/Dockerfile.online.

builds.from_source: editor/Dockerfile.online — validated; builds Online from source, runtime swaps coolwsd+browser into the pinned base (image tag: po-editor-online). Smoke: /hosting/discovery 200, browser bundle 200.
builds.stopgap: editor/Dockerfile — patches the prebuilt base image in place (interim).
